change_boundary.what_changed: Added MA-14 Agent Safety Doctrine text, a JSON manifest schema template, an enforcement validator, tests, a Makefile target, a CI gate, and an MA-12 README subsection label alignment required by the documentation validator.
change_boundary.why_changed: The attached architecture review requires hardening against implementation drift by making coding agents subordinate to law, blueprint, contract, implementation, pipeline, and tool authority.
assumptions: Agent-authored governance changes can be represented as JSON manifests.
Blueprint authority references can be repository paths to constitutional or blueprint artifacts.
change_boundary.reversal: Remove .github/scripts/validate-agent-safety-doctrine.py, tests/test_agent_safety_doctrine.py, .github/workflows/agent-safety-doctrine-gate.yml, templates/AGENT_SAFETY_DOCTRINE_MANIFEST_TEMPLATE.json, this manifest, and revert the MA-14 additions in META_ARCHITECT_LAWBOOK.md, REPO_PROOF_LAW.md, HUMAN_AI_CO_COLLABORATION_CHARTER.md, README.md, and Makefile.

uncertainty.resolution_path: If manifest scope or blueprint authority is disputed, hold the change and escalate to Meta Architect review before merge.
